description_long: This object is a compact semi-automatic handgun with a predominantly matte black metal frame and slide, complemented by brown wooden grip panels on both sides. The slide features engraved markings, including text and possibly a serial number, adding to its authenticity and detail. The grip panels are secured with visible screws and have a smooth, polished finish, contrasting with the utilitarian metal body. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is short and flush with the slide, with no visible threading or compensator. Overall, the handgun exhibits a classic, utilitarian design typical of early to mid-20th-century pistols.
description: A compact, black metal handgun with polished brown wooden grips and engraved slide markings, featuring a rounded trigger guard and a short, flush barrel.
description_view_0: The left side of the handgun shows the engraved slide markings, brown wooden grip panel, and the overall compact profile.
description_view_1: The top-down view highlights the narrow width of the handgun and the alignment of the barrel and slide.
description_view_2: The right side displays the opposite wooden grip panel, slide, and the absence of visible markings on this side.
description_view_3: The front view focuses on the barrel opening and the rounded trigger guard, emphasizing the handgun's compact muzzle.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features smooth, polished brown wooden panels with a subtle sheen, secured by visible screws. The panels are flat with gently rounded edges, lacking aggressive texturing or finger grooves, and present a classic, minimalist appearance. No logos, checkering, or embellishments are visible, giving the grip a traditional and understated look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, forming a smooth, continuous curve around the trigger area. It is of standard size, without undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories. The surface appears smooth and untextured, with no reinforcement or distinctive design elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the front of the slide, exhibiting a standard round profile with no visible threading, porting, or compensator. The exterior finish matches the matte black of the slide, and no special markings or features are present on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: The left side of the slide features engraved text, including a line that appears to reference a manufacturer or model and a date, rendered in a serif font. The markings are subtle but clearly visible against the matte black finish, with no additional logos or decorative patterns apparent.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extension, bevel, or flare. There are no visible finger rests, logos, or texturing, resulting in a simple and utilitarian appearance.
